creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
This is Phusion Passenger update that fixes the issue of building it using CLANG 3.3 on FreeBSD 10.0-RC3 as reported in: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2014-January/088787.html

Fix: Patch applied.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Apply the patch, build the www/rubygem-passenger port.
